_publications._publicationTitle: PET imaging for attention deficit preclinical drug testing in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.
_publications._context: Nf1 +/− GFAP CKO (CKO) and control littermate Nf1 flox/flox (WT) mice were maintained on an inbred C57BL/6 background | Nf1flox/flox (Zhu et al. 2001) and Nf1GFAP CKO (Bajenaru et al. 2002) mice were generated as previously described and maintained on a C57Bl/6 background | Nf1 +/− GFAP CKO (CKO) with one non-functional Nf1 allele in all somatic cells and complete Nf1 loss in GFAP+ (glial) cells | Optic chiasm was microdissected from 3-month-old Nf1 flox/flox, Nf1 +/− and Nf1 +/− GFAP CKO mice

_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.
Dopamine deficiency underlies learning deficits in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.
Mouse low-grade gliomas contain cancer stem cells with unique molecular and functional properties.
